summary: Iteration 39: Frontend testing of grouped sidebar navigation with collapsible sections. All 10 test scenarios passed. Tested: login, 5 section headers (TABLEAU DE BORD, ASSETS, RÉSERVATIONS, SUIVI, ADMINISTRATION), section toggle with chevron animation, active section auto-opens, navigation to Assets/Mes réservations, KPI notification badge (9+), sidebar collapse (240px→64px), dark mode toggle, and navigation routes.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Login with admin/user@1234 - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
TEST 2: 5 section headers found - TABLEAU DE BORD, ASSETS, RÉSERVATIONS, SUIVI, ADMINISTRATION
TEST 3: Active section auto-opens - Dashboard active, overview section chevron rotated
TEST 4: Section toggle - chevron animation works (open/close)
TEST 5: Navigate to Assets - /view/engin/index, assets section auto-opens
TEST 6: Navigate to Mes réservations - /reservation/myreservations, reservations section auto-opens
TEST 7: KPI notification badge - shows '9+' red badge on KPI item
TEST 8: Sidebar collapse - 240px→64px, section headers hidden, thin separator lines visible
TEST 9: Dark mode toggle - lt-dark class added/removed on document.documentElement
TEST 10: Navigation routes - Dashboard, Activité, Paramètres routes verified
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumSidebar.jsx: NAV_SECTIONS correctly defines 5 sections with proper IDs and items (lines 13-56)
PremiumSidebar.jsx: toggleSection function works correctly, disabled when collapsed (line 80-83)
PremiumSidebar.jsx: Auto-open section on route change via useEffect (lines 105-111)
PremiumSidebar.jsx: Chevron animation via lt-nav-section-chevron--open class with transform:rotate(180deg) (line 271)
PremiumSidebar.jsx: Collapsed mode hides section headers, shows only icons (lines 321-330)
PremiumSidebar.jsx: Notification badge on KPI item with hasNotif flag (line 36, 166-168)
PremiumLayout.jsx: marginLeft correctly set to 64/240 based on collapsed state (line 61)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested grouped sidebar navigation. Key data-testids verified: premium-sidebar, nav-section-{overview|assets|reservations|monitoring|admin}, section-toggle-{id}, sidebar-nav-{itemId}, sidebar-dark-toggle, sidebar-logout, sidebar-toggle, sidebar-notif-badge. Sidebar width: 240px expanded, 64px collapsed. Section IDs: overview, assets, reservations, monitoring, admin. Item IDs: command, dashboard, assets, zones, gateway, planning, gantt, res-planning, res-my, res-dash, activity, alerts, reports, users, roles, clients, settings. Chevron animation uses lt-nav-section-chevron--open class. Dark mode uses lt-dark class on documentElement.
